summary: The diff only shows a modification to project_state.json (a metadata/state tracking file), with no changes to the three source files required by the build request: frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts, frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts, and frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx.
